name: Asus Prime Z890-P Wifi-CSM
highlights: ASUS PRIME Z890-P WIFI-CSM is an advanced ATX motherboard built to support Intel® Core™ Ultra Processors (Series 2) on the LGA1851 socket, powered by the robust Intel® Z890 chipset
Engineered for performance and connectivity, it features DDR5 memory support up to 8666+MT/s (OC), PCIe 5
0 expansion, next-gen Wi-Fi 7, Thunderbolt™ 4, and comprehensive cooling solutions
Designed for DIY builders and power users, it integrates ASUS-exclusive Q-Design, 5X Protection III, and Aura Sync RGB for a smarter, cooler, and more personalized PC experience
